content.rendered:
Ellegant Era Salon & Academy is the best makeup academy in Bangalore, offering exquisite courses to students and remarkable services to clients at an affordable cost. Our makeup institute calms down your curiosity about learning various makeup tricks and techniques. Ellegant Era Salon & Academy itself provides makeup training sessions to the students.

Ellegant Era Salon & Academy has been the leading bridal makeup artist in Bangalore. Leading the top makeup academy near Bangalore, she is generating a bunch of future makeup artists. Ellegant Era Salon & Academy has received ample national and international training, starting her career with MAC.

Ellegant Era Salon & Academy has been a makeup lover since her childhood days. She has built what she dreamt of, and this is called a perfect achievement. An outstanding top makeup artist in Bangalore cares for such a brilliant makeup institute under the superb Ellegant Era Salon & Academy in Bangalore.
